---
name: New device
about: Submit a fingerprint sensor not yet supported upstream
title: "[device] vendor:product - chip name"
labels: new-device
---

**USB ID** (`vendor:product` from `lsusb`, e.g. `27c6:55b4`):

**Chip / sensor name** (e.g. Goodix GF3268; check firmware family if known):

**Hardware** (laptop make/model, or other device the sensor is in):

**What is broken in upstream libfprint** (unknown device? enroll fails? verify
unreliable? error messages):

**Existing fix, if any** (link to a fork/branch/patch/issue you are basing this
on, or that already works for you):

**Distros tested** (distro + libfprint/fprintd versions, and what works:
enroll/verify/login/sudo/lock):

**Anything else** (logs, `FP_DEBUG=all` output, reverse-engineering notes):
